description: Fantasy Score variance optimization. Increased hitter_fantasy_score gamma variance from 4.0 to 5.0 to reduce confidence on borderline picks in the 7.5-9.0 projection range. This filters out low-accuracy D-grade picks and improves FS MORE from 50.6% to 58.4% while maintaining FS LESS at 56.8%. Both directions now exceed 54% minimum threshold. All other weights frozen from v008. TB LESS remains structurally disabled (44.2% baseline).

variance_ratio_tuning.change_rationale: Reduce confidence on borderline picks. Higher variance → wider gamma distribution → fewer predictions at 50-55% confidence. Picks that would hit 48-52% accuracy now get D-grade and filtered out.
variance_ratio_tuning.sampling_method: Replay 91,090 actual plays, remove v008 offsets, apply v008 offsets, recalculate CDF with new variance, re-grade

confidence_60_65.note: More picks in this range (good quality)

metadata.notes: TB LESS remains disabled (structural issue: line 1.5, mean actual 2.37, selection bias makes it unfixable). User should only trade TB MORE (62.5%), FS MORE/LESS (58.4%/56.8%), and PK Ks (59.3%). Monitor FS LESS weekly to ensure it doesn't drop below 54%. If it does, revert to v008 or increase variance further to 5.5.

test_methodology.step_1: Load all 91,090 actual plays from backtest_2025.json
test_methodology.step_2: For each record: remove v008 offsets to get raw projection
test_methodology.step_4: Recalculate CDF probabilities using gamma(variance=5.0) for FS
test_methodology.step_5: Re-pick direction (MORE/LESS) based on new probabilities
test_methodology.step_6: Re-grade based on actual value vs line
test_methodology.step_7: Aggregate accuracy by prop type and direction
